column1: Hey Tessa, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
sup were you still looking for help from us with spring break?
Yea sorry! We are wanting to go to Cancun. There will be 3-4 of us.
okay cool. which week is your spring break
dope which school you all from?
Word! yea we've had a a couple groups from your school come through
y'all always got good energy lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
Hopefully sometime in the next week or so!
okay bet yea I'll send what we have at the moment and add a payment plan. lets you reserve things with a deposit and then pay the rest off in a few weeks
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
bet whats the best email to send to
just sent that over lmk if you got it
perfect lmk what the group thinks
heyy Tessa whats up, how we feelin about those options so far?
Hi! Can we make it a Monday through Saturday?
Friday being the last night it's booked and we would fly out Saturday
Perfect. It is 3 of us for sure, do i just book through the link?
hey i can make you a reservation right now, so you 3 can lock in your spots
hey did we wanna get that set up?
How would payment work? Would we have to just pay through the link. Can everyone pay for there own or is it one payment

yea so next step I set up the reservation portal for your specific group. each person hops on that link, joins an open slot, makes their own account, and makes their own deposit. the deposit is $200 to secure the spot
remaining balance is due in 2 weeks so gives you a little time to gather yourself
everyone covers there own payments so you dont have to put it all on one card
lmk if you want me to set that up
Yes please set up the portal the three of us will make sure our deposits are payed by tommorow. Thank you so much
okay dope yea I'll send it through email in a few. itll be active through tomorrow
Monday through friday, so March 16-20 right? Cancun
dope, just noticed the 401, you from Rhode Island?
just emailed over your reservation. let me now if you need any help getting on the reservation tomorrow
i just resent it! here it is too tho https://secure.springbreaku.com/site/public/package/AKUNRK8WEG

Hi one of the girls has a passport on the way and can't put her deposit down because it requires the passport info. Is there any way to get around that? She Shoukd have the passport in the next few weeks.
hey you can actually skip that part and add it in later
so she'll be able to deposit then add her info in when she gets her passport/flight
lmk if she still needs help, def a lil confusing lol
Hey are you on the same flight as Gretchen and Lola?
also were you guys lookin to add any party pass tickets to your package?
I am on the same flight there! Me and Lola are on a different one than Gretchen going back to New York.
okay word, you able to log into your account and add in the flight info?
party pass is dope comes with express entry, cover charge, and open bar at our off resort hosted nightclub events
venues like D'Cave, Coco Bongo, HOF, Vaquita, Mandala, Mandala Beach, and more
Is that all off of the resort?
yea theyre all a 5 mile ride from the resort into the party center
yoo Tessa are you on the same flight as Gretch and Lola
I'm on the same flight there
I can't find where to put my flight info I.
Can you schedule the transportation for the pick up when we arrive the same as them?
Everyone's pickup is treated individually so we def need each of your flights added in individually
Our ops team schedules your transportation for when you land
I will land at the same time as them. I have all my flight info but can't find my confirmation code and looking now
Cool just need the conf code for the way there
Ok I will have that in asap
This is the message I'm getting
Hey! Me and Lola have a later flight than Gretchen tommorow but we're all hoping to take the same transportation, me and Lola will just be early. Is there any way you can do that.
Hey hey, how much later is your flight?
Gretchen's is at 1150 and me and Lola's is 315
Hi just checking in about the transportation tommorow

hey thanks for the patience was checking in with the team. there is a big difference in your flight times, especially since the shuttle is typically 3 hours before departure. so you'd be spending a lot of time tomorrow morning a the airport if youre cool with that
Yes we're cool with that, thanks for helping
Okay cool, I would head down to the lobby, if you see Veronica or any of the other Go Blue staff, let them know that you and Lola would like to check out and take the early shuttle with Gretch
I'm sure she'll be okay with it
Ok, should we do that today?
hey checking in, did that work out?
yes it did! We are at the airport now. Thanks for your help
dope no prob. glad you all had a good time
